contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 30
- Description: capoeira: practice dashboard at top + per-move thumbnails + library demo modal
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/capoeira/pull/10
  
  Details:
  Three UX additions to capoeira.agroverse.shop after Gary tried the local copy:
  
  1. practice.html landing shows the past-sessions dashboard at the top
     (previously only visible after a session completed).
  
  2. Generated-session preview now shows a Bico Duro YouTube thumbnail per
     move, each clickable to open the demo on YouTube in a new tab. Static
     i.ytimg.com images with a centered play overlay — no iframes on the
     preview (4-6 iframes per page is too heavy).
  
  3. library.html: click any move row → modal with embedded youtube-nocookie
     demo + pedagogy notes + PT/EN transcripts. Close via x / Esc / click-
     outside. Picked modal over inline-expand and over new-tab because users
     scan many moves but go deep on one at a time.
  
  Gary's verdict on the bundle: "I love the experience." Saved the validated
  UX patterns to memory so future iterations don't drift back to heavier
  inline iframe patterns.
  
  PR: TrueSightDAO/capoeira#10 (merged squash).
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 50.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
